summary.intent: Fix a PR review comment flagged by Greptile about a stale code comment that listed outdated model versions.
summary.outcome: Updated the comment on line 652 of crates/providers/src/lib.rs to include M2.7, then committed and pushed the fix to the open PR.

repo: Model version routing logic lives in crates/providers/src/lib.rs around line 652
M2.7 was added to the same context-window branch as M2/M2.1/M2.5 but the inline comment was not updated at the time

code.finding: Context-window branch comment previously listed M2/M2.1/M2.5; M2.7 also routes through this branch and needed to be added

workflow: Greptile is used as an automated PR reviewer and flags stale comments alongside functional issues
PR review comments, issue comments, and reviews are fetched separately via the GitHub API
